title: AirConnect
description: 让 UPnP/Sonos 和 Chromecast 设备支持 AirPlay 音频串流
description_en: Use AirPlay to stream to UPnP/Sonos and Chromecast devices

title: 访问AP/光猫
description: 让局域网客户端访问不同子网的AP或光猫（只支持 OpenWRT 21 以上）
description_en: Allows clients in the local network to access AP or modem on different subnet. (Only OpenWRT 21+)
author: jjm2473

title: Arcadia一站式代码运维平台
description: 脚本语言编程与运维，支持定时任务调度。
description_en: Script language programming and operation. Supporting scheduled task scheduling.
author: SuperManito

title: ChineseSubFinder中文字幕
description: ChineseSubFinder是一个中文字幕平台。
description_en: ChineseSubFinder is a Chinese subtitle platform.
author: ChineseSubFinder

title: CloudDrive2
description: CloudDrive 是一个强大的多云盘管理工具，为用户提供包含云盘本地挂载的一站式的多云盘解决方案。
description_en: CloudDrive is a powerful multi-cloud drive management tool with local mounting of cloud drives.
author: CloudDrive/jjm2473

title: CodeServer
description: 一个在线版本的VSCode，可以在线开发。
description_en: An online version of VSCode that can be developed online.

description: DDNSTO内网穿透，可以外网远程你的路由器

title: 容器魔王
description: 【魔王现世】为 iStoreOS 特制，收益更高。每月至高可赚「千元」，现在上线秒领「30天20%收益加成」，挂机托管自动赚米，拿到手软！替代网心云的「容器魔方」。
author: 网心云

title: DPanel 可视化面板
description: 轻量化 docker 可视化管理面板。
description_en: A lightweight docker visual management panel.

title: DrawIO绘图
description: DrawIO是运行在浏览器中的在线绘图工具。
description_en: DrawIO is an online drawing tool that runs in the browser.

title: Emby影院
description: Emby是一个多媒体串流平台，可以让您方便地管理和串流您的媒体。
description_en: Emby is the volunteer-built media solution that puts you in control of your media.

title: Excalidraw画板
description: Excalidraw是支持多人协同的私有化在线画板工具。
description_en: Excalidraw is a privatized online drawing board tool that supports multi-person collaboration.

title: FastNet 网络测速
description: FastNet 提供网络测速与网络诊断 Web UI，默认端口 3200。
description_en: FastNet provides network testing tools and a Web UI (default port 3200).
author: xiaobao

title: 浮动网关
description: 浮动网关可以让你在内网有两个相互备份的网关，出现问题会相互切换。
description_en: FloatingGateway allows two gateway within one lan which can switch between each other in case of a failure.

title: Gogs服务
description: 一款极易搭建的自助Git服务。
description_en: An easy-to-build self-service Git service.
author: Gogs

title: Heimdall
description: Heimdall 应用程序仪表板是所有 Web 应用程序的仪表板。不过，它不需要仅限于应用程序，您可以添加任何您喜欢的链接
description_en: Heimdall Application Dashboard is a dashboard for all your web applications. It doesn't need to be limited to applications though, you can add links to anything you like.

title: Home Assistant
description: 开源智能家居系统，将本地控制和隐私放在首位。

title: nextcloud
